title: matelea costata var. goodfriendii
intro: Matelea costata var. goodfriendii, also known as Goodfriend's Matelea, is a variety of the Matelea costata plant, a type of flowering vine native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Matelea costata var. goodfriendii include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
